raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a dispute about a charge on my card for XXXX cents I was told that I would get a new card and that I did not have to pay the amount. I got my bill and the amount is showing along with another fraudulent charge of XXXX which I have no idea who this charge of XXXX dollars is from so I filed a dispute on XX/XX/year>. 
My concern at this time is for the XXXX which I was told that someone called me and I refused to provide any information I never got a call and refused to give my name etc. I have the information if I had been asked I could and would have provided to them.
